prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `fc10701f`.
codex_response:
Implemented `fc10701f` end to end. The verifier applies the rule “`9 -> 7`, original `7 -> 6`, then project only the `0` rows or columns that lie strictly in the gap between the two aligned blocks onto the `9` block span as `2`.” I used the `opus` hint and explicitly rejected the `sonnet` hint because it overgeneralized to all `0` rows/columns, which the official examples do not support; that note is recorded in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_fc10701f/notes.md). No new reusable primitive was needed.

The task package is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_fc10701f/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_fc10701f/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_fc10701f/generator.py), and [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_fc10701f/notes.md). Generated artifacts are in [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/fc10701f/task.json), [examples/](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/fc10701f/examples), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/fc10701f/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/fc10701f/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/fc10701f/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/fc10701f/previews/preview_03.png).

Validation passed: `python -m arc2.shared.verify --task fc10701f` gave `4/4` official examples, and `python -m arc2.shared.build --task fc10701f --n-examples 1000` completed successfully. I also spot-checked generated outputs and the preview sheet; the generator is mixing both orientations, square sizes `1x1` through `4x4`, and includes outside-gap `0` distractors so it stays close to the official family rather than collapsing to the minimal case.
